projects.description: The Quality Playbook is an open-source skill that turns AI coding agents into rigorous quality engineers. Point it at your code, in any language. Feed it whatever docs you have: READMEs, GitHub issues, Discord threads, AI chat history. It figures out your intent, creates a real requirements spec, and does quality engineering to find real defects.
